name: Running Finish
preceding_figure_names: Back Lock, Cross Swivel, Hover Corte, Natural Turn And Back Lock, Progressive Chasse To Right
following_figure_names: Forward Lock, Natural Turn And Back Lock, Natural Pivot Turn, Natural Spin Turn, Natural Turn With Hesitation, Natural Turn, Quick Open Reverse, Fish Tail, Four Quick Run (at corner, LF back with Lady OP, TH, S into Four Quick Run; or at corner, LF back with lady OP, TH, S into Four Quick Runs), V6 (2-12, at corner, LF back with Lady OP, TH, S into 2-12 V6; or 2-12, at corner, LF back with Lady OP, TH, S into Four Quick Runs), Tipsy To L (then into 2-12 V6 DC or 2-5 Back Lock down LOD.; or then into 2-12 V6 DC or 2-5 Back Lock down LOD.), Six Quick Run (at corner, LF back with Lady OP, TH, S into Six Quick Run; or at corner, LF back with Lady OP, TH, S into Six Quick Run.)
notes:
Timing can also be: QQSS
Can be commenced in other alignments, e.g. starting BLOD, ending DC.
Man may turn 1/4 between 1-2 when a facing alignment would be used. Lady would turn 1/8 between 1-2 and 1/8 between 2-3.

steps.action: back in CBMP, Backing DW, T, Start to turn R, Sway(S), CBM, Rise e/o 1
to side and slightly fwd, Pointing to LOD, T, body turns less, Sway(L), Up
comments: Man can turn 1/4 to end DW on new LOD.
Man should shape left to allow lady to pass and to make the turn easier.

steps.action: fwd preparing to step OP left side leading, Facing LOD, TH, Body turn to R, Sway(L), Up, lower e/o 3
fwd in CBMP, OP, Facing LOD, H, Sway(S), CBM
fwd in CBMP, OP, Facing DW, HT, Start to turn R, Sway(S), CBM, Rise e/o 1
comments: Really drive the step, go through Man

steps.action: to side, Backing DC, T, 1/4 between 1-2, Sway(R), Up
comments: L side is very stretched, lift L hip
Can shape to R, head goes with shape, to R
Lady can turn 1/8, will end BDW on new LOD

steps.action: back, R side leading, Backing LOD, TH, 1/8 between 2-3, Sway(R), Up, lower e/o 3
comments: Lower and push off standing R leg, bigger next step.

steps.action: back in CBMP, Backing LOD, T, Sway(S)
